channel.title: Ram Guthula
channel.description: Cloud architecture, DevOps, Kubernetes, Terraform, and platform engineering articles from Ram Guthula.

item.title: Terraform for Beginners: What to Learn First
item.description: A practical beginner roadmap for learning Terraform, from providers and state to modules, environments, and team workflows.

item.title: Kubernetes on AWS: A Pragmatic Operating Model
item.description: A practical operating model for Kubernetes on AWS, covering standardization, observability, ownership, security, and delivery guardrails.

item.title: Platform Engineering Best Practices That Actually Help
item.description: Practical platform engineering best practices for building golden paths, self-service workflows, trust, and sustainable developer platforms.
